omnimcp.note: Hosted OmniMCP by Arcade.dev MCP server. Uses OAuth (RFC 9728 Protected Resource Metadata) — on first connection Cursor will prompt you to authorize with Arcade. After sign-in, the agent discovers tools via Arcade_SelectTools and runs them via Arcade_UseTool. Individual tools that need a provider (Google, GitHub, Slack, ...) return a one-time authorization link the first time they run.
